The '''Nalmar Family''' was once the largest criminal organization on [[Genesia]], and controlled much of the illicit activities in [[Brak sector/Legends|Brak sector]].

The Nalmar Family originally dealt with smuggled goods, but once [[Eelien Kirat]] took over, the family expanded to include extortion and large scale fraud. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the family was run by [[Ral Nalmar]] until he and most of his family were murdered in an attack ordered by [[Qual'om Soach]], the family's chief rival in Brak sector.

One of the family's chief smugglers, Eelien Kirat, tried to preserve the Family by appointing Ral's oldest daughter, [[Elana Nalmar]], as his second-in-command in order to ease tensions over the change in leadership.
